root-question.text: Is a replay harness available (deterministic seed, stubbed tools)?

question.text: Are fault classes catalogued for each tool used?

branch.conclusion: Run chaos-eval. Baseline first, then with fault injection. Report per-fault-class.
Author the rubric first; chaos without it produces uninterpretable scores.
Catalogue per-tool fault classes first; chaos without catalogue is not reproducible.

example.p: harness_available=true → catalogue=true → rubric=true → conclusion: run-chaos-eval; baseline 0.85 → chaos 0.72 with corrupted_return confidently_wrong=2 → block promotion.
